sourcesContent:
const posts = [ { id: 1, title: 'Privacy', description: 'At Next Stop, we respect your privacy and are committed to safeguarding your personal information. We only collect essential data needed to improve your experience, such as your email for account creation. We never share your data with third parties without your consent, and you have full control over your account and the visibility of your content.', }, { id: 2, title: 'Security', description: 'Next Stop prioritizes the safety of our user\'s data. We use industry-standard encryption, including JWT-based authentication, to protect user information and prevent unauthorized access. Access control is enforced at all levels to ensure only authorized users can modify data. Regular security audits and vulnerability assessments are conducted to strengthen our defenses against potential threats.', }, { id: 3, title: 'Copyright', description: 'Next Stop is dedicated to respecting intellectual property rights. Users are responsible for ensuring that all uploaded content, including images and descriptions, complies with copyright laws. For any copyright infringement concerns, please contact us to initiate a takedown process in accordance with the DMCA.', }, ] export default function PolicyPage() { return (

Read our policies

Take a look at our policies regarding privacy, security, and copyright.

{posts.map((post) => (
{post.category.title}

{post.title}

{post.description}

{post.author.role}

))}
) }
